name: aesculus hippocastanum
title: aesculus hippocastanum benefits
description: Aesculus hippocastanum reduces hypertension, which is a condition characterized by persistently elevated blood pressure that can lead to cardiovascular disease, stroke, and kidney damage. This benefit is crucial as high blood pressure is often asymptomatic, making regular monitoring essential to prevent severe complications such as heart failure, vision loss, and cognitive impairment. The aesculus hippocastanum plant possesses bioactive constituents, including saponins and flavonoids, ...
